item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
it's called self care
do not disturb them
Glenn Close? more like Glenn Far
who doesn't?
accurate
that looks like a flan?
sad state of affairs
nope
nailed it
i am close and the image seems really familiar. tell me your thoughts imgur
clicking won't work unfortunately
what the frig did corbo do?
mmm hmm
when you're high as giraffe titties
damnit chris
every day is a great day for deicide
that's all for this one.. have a great weekend gang!!

item.title: The French sure aren’t subtle
item.description:
During the Olympics opening ceremonies: A French metal band hanging off the side of a building playing over a bunch of flamethrowers. Metal. The band is Gojira and they’re awesome.
But it gets better! The song they played was about the French people imprisoning and beheading the French leaders during the French Revolution..from the building the French leaders were imprisoned in..played in front of a bunch current French and other world leaders!
Complete with just the right amount of symbolism.
item.dc:creator: IWantToSeeMountainsAgain

item.title: Have some voice actors
item.description:
Technically not voice-acting, but it's too cool not to share. The voicechanger is a Sonovox.
It's almost as if voice actors have layers. Like an onion.
richardwells48 on tiktok, not sure if he's on instagram
https://www.instagram.com/danieljferguson/

item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: Oh man I’m not looking forward to the reactions
item.description: The story is about a man who returns to his childhood home after 20 years to care for his estranged father who’s dying of advanced Alzheimer’s. As the disease whittles away at the man his father once was, long buried memories begin to resurface, revealing a dark, disturbing truth. The epilogue is a fkn doozy and a half. I tie together the 12 stories in the anthology through the story of a deranged witch who seeks to provide her satanic master with a human vessel by building a homunculus using tokens from each of the different stories. I can tell already my über religious mother is just gonna love it /s. Ughhh it’s already available to preorder kindle/ebook versions before the paperbacks go on sale and I’m freaking out.
item.dc:creator: friendswithfire

item.title: I’m sure Celine Dion was great
item.description: Never have. Never really will. Sport is nice, but keep it friendly. We’re still all human. Edit: I think the IOC is as guilty as FIFA. Humanity for everyone.

item.title: Happy Belated Cake Day To Me
item.description: Missed my cake day yesterday Saucy: https://x.com/NoContextHumans/status/1816767043519021248?t=5gVgzoBbEpLijG-1JvLmzw&s=19 Yeah, yeah. I know everyone hates Twitter. But if you can block out the sheer volume of extreme hate on that site, you can find nuggets of good stuff left here and there (I refuse to call it anything else beside Twitter) Edit: Someone in the comments gave the link to the original: https://www.instagram.com/p/C9wk3vUIQvs/?igsh=aDRtN2x6cnZrYm03 Thank you @EccentricNut

item.title: Paris 2024 opening was epic

item.title: The one man at my job club told a story and it and him were
item.description: The weekly Job Club I go to is run by a city and state hospital to help people with disabilities find careers. Well, the one gentleman seemed perfectly fine as this was the first club he had been to. So, we were all sharing stories of our struggles of trying to find a job in the current job market. Well, the new guy starts to tell a story about how he had to quit his job because of bullying. I have been bullied in the workplace, so my heart went out to him. Hang on! Suddenly, his story switched gears into sheer lunacy I have only heard on 4chan or by crackpots. He continued by saying that he was working at a state polling location and his coworkers were furries. Yes! You read that, right furries! At this point, I thought that I heard him wrong. Nevertheless, I did hear him right as he repeated that the coworkers were furries. Additionally, they would come to work dressed in their fursuits. Also, the gentleman went on to say that the one furry threatened to cut off his fingers if he didn't start showing up to work in a fursuit. He continued saying they threw pencils and screw drivers at him on the job all while in their fursuits. He ended the story by saying that he told HR and that they did nothing about it. Henceforth, he quit. Now, I have been working with this organization for a few years now, off and on. For that reason, I have worked and spoken with people of all abilities. Nonetheless, I have never experienced someone tell a story like this as if it were a fact. I'm really concerned about this man if he will just tell a story so nonsensical that he himself believes to be true. I don't know what compelled him to tell the group this story.
item.dc:creator: zeacorzeppelin10

item.title: He's part of the crew now
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: Proud Moment
item.description: It may not be impressive to most but a year ago I was too heavy to walk for 5 minutes without gasping and now I'm slowly climbing walls. Working on your fitness is worth it no matter where you start.
item.dc:creator: thelonehedgehog

item.title: Meme dump 523: strangle juice
item.description:
Suggested track: FM-84 - Running In The Night https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TvZskcqdYcE
One time I bought some new boxer briefs, then when I put on a pair I felt my left thumb being cut. I looked around for a moment and noticed that the square of logo fabric on the front left side was so stiff it managed to cut my thumb similar to a papercut. I was more insulted that injured, how does somebody get cut by washed underwear?
funniest joke ever
i'll be whatever I wanna do
Cat tax More meme dumps: https://imgur.com/a/nJX3uln
item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus
